output.answer: {"name": "answer", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT (COUNT(?award) AS ?count) WHERE { wd:Q47703 wdt:P166 ?award. }", "answer": "Yes, The Godfather won 7 Academy Awards."}}
output.formatted:
{"name": "answer", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT (COUNT(?award) AS ?count) WHERE { wd:Q47703 wdt:P166 ?award. }", "answer": "Yes, The Godfather won 7 Academy Awards."}}

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(COUNT(?award) AS ?count) WHERE {
  wd:Q47703 wdt:P166 ?award .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| count       |
| ----------- |
| 7 (xsd:int) |
